19.name: refund_and_exchange_savings_summary_gate
19.feedback: Before ending, include both the refund amount and the combined total savings for the exchange option. Do not provide only separate item amounts.

36.name: most_expensive_item_summary_gate
36.feedback: Before ending, explicitly identify the most expensive item and its price, then complete the permitted order change if the user confirms.

95.name: two_exchange_price_breakdown_gate
95.feedback: Before ending, include each laptop exchange price difference and the total amount due or refunded today.

103.name: cancelled_order_tracking_gate
103.feedback: Before ending, provide the requested tracking number for the cancelled order if it is available from the order records.

104.name: cancelled_order_tracking_gate
104.feedback: Before ending, provide the requested tracking number for the cancelled order if it is available from the order records.
